title: The Lantern Atlas
author: Meera Das
description: A reflective journey through coastal towns and remembered maps.

title: River Between Windows
author: Ishan Vale
description: A quiet mystery centered on two apartments overlooking the same river.

title: Quiet Circuits
author: Noor Sen
description: An accessible collection of essays about everyday electronics.

title: Clay and Monsoon
author: Rhea Kapoor
description: A family story set around a pottery workshop during one rainy season.

title: The Last Paper Map
author: Aarav Bose
description: A history of hand-drawn city maps and the people who made them.

title: A Garden of Small Machines
author: Tara Menon
description: Short illustrated explanations of useful mechanical ideas.

title: Notes from Blue Hill
author: Kabir Roy
description: A musician’s journal about practice, travel, and community performances.

title: The Sunday Telescope
author: Leela Anand
description: A curious child learns to observe the night sky with a handmade telescope.

title: Salt Road Almanac
author: Devika Shah
description: Stories of old trade routes, roadside kitchens, and seasonal travel.

title: Night Bus to Amber Bay
author: Om Prakash
description: A missing suitcase turns an overnight journey into a layered mystery.

title: The Library of Rain
author: Maya Verma
description: A neighborhood library becomes a gathering place during a long monsoon.

title: One Hundred Tiny Questions
author: Nilofer Khan
description: A playful collection of questions designed for curious young readers.
